gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (21/82)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (21/82)
text: الْغُلَامُ يَلْعَبُ سَبْعَ سِنِينَ وَ يَتَعَلَّمُ الْكِتَابَ سَبْعَ سِنِينَ وَ يَتَعَلَّمُ الْحَلَالَ وَ الْحَرَامَ سَبْعَ سِنِينَ .

en.hubeali: Ahmad Bin Muhammad Al Aasimy, from Ali Bin Al Hassan, from Ali Bin Asbaat, from his uncle Yaqoub Bin Saalim,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘The boy plays for seven years, and he learns the Book (Quran) for seven years, and learns the Permissible and the Prohibitions for seven years’.
en.sarwar: 3. Ahmad ibn Muhammad has narrated from Muhammad al-‘Asemiy from Ali ibn al-Hassan from Ali ibn Asbat from his uncle Ya’qub ibn Salim who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘A boy can play for seven years, learn how to read and write for another seven years and learn the lawful and unlawful matters in another seven years.’”
